regression_tests: terminal_client/test/widget_test_reconnect.dart::does not reconnect-loop when stream drops while app is backgrounded
root_cause: Reconnect loop while app is backgrounded caused heartbeat timeouts. Fixed by skipping reconnect in background and triggering immediate reconnect on foreground return.
notes: All 127 auto-detected reports share this description. One resolution file suppresses all of them. The noisy auto-detect was also removed from the liveness loop (32eec640).
